title: koeleria macrantha var. eminens
intro: Koeleria macrantha var. eminens, also known as tall blue grama grass, is a type of grass native to the western United States and Canada. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Koeleria macrantha var. eminens include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Koeleria macrantha var. eminens can be made by infusing the dried leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's extract in capsules or tinctures.
